queries.title: Search Keywords
queries.description: List of business types or keywords to search for. Example: ["restaurant", "hotel", "travel agent"]

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Cities, regions, or countries to search in. Example: ["Bali, Indonesia", "New York, USA"]

maxResultsPerQuery.title: Max Results Per Query
maxResultsPerQuery.description: Maximum number of leads to collect for each query+location combination.

language.title: Language
language.description: Browser language / locale for Google Maps. Affects the language of returned results.

proxyList.title: Proxy List
proxyList.description: Optional list of proxy URLs for rotation. One URL per entry. Format: http://user:pass@host:port or http://host:port. Leave empty to run without proxy.

headless.title: Headless Browser
headless.description: Run Chromium in headless mode. Should be true for production runs.
